case_title: C.A.R.S. DAWYDIAK VS MITCHELL, CHET et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $931.59 FILED BY C.A.R.S. DAWYDIAK AS TO DEFENDANT MITCHELL, CHET SERRAMONTE AUTO PLAZA BODY SHOP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-08-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-08-1993, CONTINUED BY COURT TO FEB-09-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
LETTER FROM SERRAMONTE AUTO PLAZA RECEIVED, STATING THEY'RE SEPARATE COMPANY FROM SERRAMONTE AUTO PLAZA BODY SHOP. LOOK FILE.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT MITCHELL, CHET SERRAMONTE AUTO PLAZA BODY SHOP STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT MITCHELL, CHET SERRAMONTE AUTO PLAZA BODY SHOP PER ORDER OF PRESIDING JUDGE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF C.A.R.S. DAWYDIAK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MITCHELL, CHET SERRAMONTE AUTO PLAZA BODY SHOP $931.59 PRINCIPAL, $19.79 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $951.38 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT MITCHELL, CHET SERRAMONTE AUTO PLAZA BODY SHOP HEARING SET FOR JAN-19-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF JAN-19-1994, GRANTED
CERT. RECEIPT TO CHET MITCHELL (SERRAMONTE AUTO) RETURNED SIGNED.
